race.comment: CENSORI (4) looks a nice chance. She was well beaten fresh at Geelong in a Class 1 but that looks a stronger race and she reportedly felt the firm ground there having won well on debut in town at Sandown Lakeside. She should improve quickly here and can do much better. MAHMUDAH (8) is off a solid maiden win as a $1.75 favourite here last time out, sitting on speed and dashing best to score by 0.8 lengths. She'll roll forward and give a sight. Wary of BREAK THE TABOO (10) who won dominantly last time at Ararat in a 0-56, scoring by four lengths. She'd been going well prior and can measure up. THUNDER HAWK (6) is knocking on the door with back to back runner up finishes and should be right there again.
